nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me do monotonous tasks (like alphabetizing)

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorming ideas (especially when I need multiple ideas and am running out of steam)

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: help me make sure I cover all my bases / include all the information I otherwise would have forgotten

nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI's definitely excels in the creativity and brainstorming department, but can lead to a lot of frustration in the (detailed) formatting department

nodes.label: Human irreplaceability through unique experience and perspective
nodes.grounding_span: there will always be a capacity in education where humans are necessary

nodes.label: Preserving personal creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I could definitely see a reliance on AI for speed and efficiency causing my creative sword to dull

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: lesson planning would be nearly impossible time-wise without having pre-built support

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoy creativity-based work, so I usually do a lot of that myself

nodes.label: Educational quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it wouldn't make sense to base a child's education on AI without direct supervision

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: there's typically at least one or two good ideas that come out of the situation

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: I should have just done it myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: hopefully, getting better, more reliable, effective, and efficient as AI progresses

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: there will always be a capacity in education where humans are necessary

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: ask for a sample rubric for a project to compare to one I have developed

nodes.label: Selective delegation — preserves core creative tasks for self
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoy creativity-based work, so I usually do a lot of that myself
